title: Gooey Citrusy Roast Filipino Liver Roast
description: A traditional Filipino dish featuring a citrus-infused liver roast, with a sweet and sticky glaze made with currants. This recipe serves 4-6 people and is perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Season the beef liver with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the liver until browned on both sides.
Transfer the liver to a baking dish and set aside.
In a small saucepan, combine the currants, brown sugar, orange juice, lime juice, ginger, and garlic.
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Brush the mixture evenly over the liver.
Roast the liver in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the liver from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
